prompt: Solve the linear system: 7x + 3y = 94 and 2x - 5y = -61. Both x and y are integers. Compute the product x*y. Give an exact integer. Put ONLY that final integer inside \boxed{}.

A triangle has sides a = 13.4 and b = 21.7, and the angle between them is C = 51.2 degrees. Using the law of cosines, compute the length of the third side c. Round to 3 decimal places. Put ONLY the final rounded number inside \boxed{}.

A planet has mass M = 4.7e24 kg and radius r = 5.9e6 m. Using the gravitational constant G = 6.674e-11 N m^2 kg^-2, compute the escape velocity v = sqrt(2GM/r) at the planet's surface, expressed in km/s. Round to 3 decimal places. Put ONLY the final rounded number inside \boxed{}.
